name: Supreme Credit Solution
description_short: Supreme Credit Solutions offers credit repair and dispute resolution services, claiming to have helped 2,000+ clients remove negative items from credit reports.
description_long:
Supreme Credit Solutions positions itself as a credit repair firm specializing in dispute resolution and credit report analysis. According to their website, the company has been operating for 8+ years with certified credit experts and claims to have helped over 2,000 clients and resolved 900+ credit disputes involving charge-offs, collections, and other inaccuracies.

The company offers three primary service tiers: a basic $149.99 "700 Club" plan (3-month package with credit report analysis and 3-bureau disputes), a mid-tier $299.99 "Couples Premium" option (full credit restoration with weekly calls), and a $499.99 comprehensive plan (one-on-one coaching and dedicated support). All packages include dispute filing, monthly progress tracking, and email or priority support. They also advertise a Black Friday promotional price of $99 for initial services and offer free consultation appointments.

The company differentiates itself through scheduled appointment slots with named credit specialists (Rich Richardson and Whitney Richardson), daily availability for consultations, and claims of personalized strategy development. Their website emphasizes a money-back guarantee, cancellation policy, and educational resources (300+ materials listed). They also appear to offer tax filing services through their specialists.

However, several red flags warrant consideration: the website contains spelling errors ("dividual" instead of "individual," "bost" instead of "boost"), vague claims about "25K+ negative items removed" without verification mechanisms, and unverified client testimonials. The service model is typical of the credit repair industry, which operates in a heavily regulated space where results are limited by law—legitimate disputes take 30-45 days per the Fair Credit Reporting Act, and companies cannot legally remove accurate negative information. The aggressive marketing (Black Friday sales, limited-time offers) is common in this sector but should prompt consumer caution.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers multiple service tiers ($149.99-$499.99) with specific inclusions like 3-bureau disputes and monthly progress updates
Provides scheduled daily appointment slots with named credit specialists for personalized consultation
Claims 8+ years of operation with certified credit experts and 2,000+ clients served
Includes free initial consultation to assess credit situation
Advertises money-back guarantee and cancellation policy for consumer protection
Offers credit education resources (300+ materials) alongside dispute services
Provides weekly or monthly progress calls depending on service tier
cons: Website contains spelling and grammar errors ("dividual," "bost") suggesting quality control issues
Client testimonials are unverified and lack verifiable details (no dates, specific outcomes, or third-party validation)
Claims like "25K+ negative items removed" lack transparency about what constitutes removal or how verified
Aggressive marketing tactics (Black Friday sales, limited-time offers, $99 promotional pricing) typical of less reputable credit repair firms
No clear explanation of legal limitations—cannot remove accurate negative information regardless of service tier, per FCRA
best_for: Consumers with multiple inaccuracies or errors on their credit reports seeking professional dispute filing
Individuals overwhelmed by credit repair process who want guided appointments and personalized strategy
People willing to pay premium prices for convenience and specialist access rather than DIY dispute filing
diagnosis: Supreme Credit Solutions is appropriate for consumers seeking professional credit dispute filing with scheduled personal consultation, but prospective clients should understand that credit repair services cannot remove accurate negative information and results depend on identifying genuine reporting errors. The website's presentation issues and unverified claims suggest thorough vetting and comparison with non-profit credit counseling or DIY dispute filing before committing to premium pricing.
services: Credit report audit and detailed analysis to identify errors and inaccuracies
Dispute resolution for inaccurate items (late payments, collections, charge-offs)
3-bureau credit disputes (included in mid-tier and higher plans)
Credit score tracking and monthly progress updates
Debt-to-income ratio analysis and debt reduction strategy
Weekly or monthly progress calls (depending on plan)
Free initial consultation and credit score breakdown
Tax filing services (offered by tax consultant specialist)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
